## ⚙️ How It Works

This repo uses a **GitHub Actions workflow** that:
1. Runs every **6 hours** automatically (cron schedule)
2. Triggers on every **push** to `main`
3. Calls the **GitHub API** to fetch live repo counts (public + private)
4. Updates this `README.md` in-place between the `<!-- REPO_COUNT_START -->` and `<!-- REPO_LIST_START -->` marker comments
5. Auto-commits the updated counts back to this repo

No manual updates needed — ever.
